use std::collections::BTreeMap;

fn lookup_prices(
    prices: &BTreeMap<String, f64>,
    product_ids: &[String],
) -> Vec<f64> {
    let mut results = Vec::new();
    for id in product_ids {
        // BAD: BTreeMap O(log n) lookup when ordering is not needed
        if let Some(price) = prices.get(id) {
            results.push(*price);
        }
    }
    results
}
